aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a decent foundation for AEO with structured content and service categorization but lacks depth in content and user engagement signals.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and improve engagement.
Expand service pages with detailed content and relevant keywords to enhance search visibility.
Implement a blog to regularly publish content related to HVAC and refrigeration trends, tips, and news.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has UTM parameters in the URL, indicating some level of tracking, but lacks clear Google Business Profile (GBP) integration.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business does not appear to have a GBP set up, which is crucial for local SEO and visibility in Google Maps and local search results.
critical_issues: Missing local business schema for GBP alignment.
Lack of local content targeting Scottsdale, AZ.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or missing NAP (Name, Address, Phone) citations across the web, which can hinder local search performance.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Create and verify listings on major local business directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and Bing Places.
Ensure NAP consistency on the website and in all marketing materials.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data for AI to understand the business context and services offered.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Voice search and AI-driven search features due to insufficient content and schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement FAQ schema and expand service pages with AI-friendly content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Leverage partnerships with manufacturers like Trane to build authority and gain backlinks.

page_title: HVAC Service in Scottsdale, AZ | AC Repair & Refrigeration
